task_completion.description: Verify the telescope is slewed to the M45 (Pleiades) target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for KStars, Ekos, or an INDI control panel showing the mount tracking M45, or coordinates matching RA ~03h 47m (3.79h) and Dec ~+24° 07' (24.116°).

task_completion.description: Verify that FITS files were generated for 6 distinct filters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Ekos capture sequence queue showing 6 different filters configured, OR a file manager/terminal showing FITS files organized by 6 distinct filters in the /home/ga/Images/commissioning/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify that FITS files were generated for 4 different binning modes (1x1 to 4x4).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Ekos capture sequence queue with binning settings of 1x1, 2x2, 3x3, and 4x4, OR a file manager/terminal showing FITS files indicating these binning levels in their names or folder structure.

task_completion.description: Verify that FITS files were generated with a 1024x1024 Region of Interest (ROI).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos capture module showing a custom ROI set to W: 1024 and H: 1024, OR a FITS viewer displaying a captured image with 1024x1024 dimensions.

task_completion.description: Verify that a summary report of the commissioning tests was saved to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying a report saved at ~/Documents/summary_report.txt (or commissioning_report.txt) containing the results of the hardware mode tests.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used an astronomy GUI application (like KStars/Ekos) to control the telescope and camera.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing interaction with the KStars/Ekos interface, rather than just terminal commands mocking the creation of FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify that the FITS files appear to be genuinely generated by the camera simulator.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of actual image capture, such as images appearing in the Ekos FITS viewer or capture progress bars, rather than empty files created with 'touch' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: Verify that the summary report contains actual observations or confirmations from the tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Read the visible text in the summary report to ensure it reflects the completed tests (e.g., mentioning specific filters, binning successes, ROI dimensions) rather than just copy-pasting the prompt instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M45 (Pleiades), RA: ~3.79 hours (03h 47m), Dec: ~24.116 degrees (+24d 07m). Tolerance: 60 arcmin. Required Filters: 6 distinct filters. Required Binning Levels: 1x1, 2x2, 3x3, 4x4. Required ROI Size: 1024x1024 pixels. Output Directory: /home/ga/Images/commissioning/. Report Path: /home/ga/Documents/commissioning_report.txt (or summary_report.txt).
